chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-561 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.2226/2022 3. For hearing of main case 15-08-2023.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present, no intimation received. Case shows that the petitioner has not pursued his petition as required. Therefore, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
